mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT m.id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.menu_type, m.path, m.component, m.perms, m.icon, m.sort_order, m.visible, m.status, m.is_cache FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.status = 1 ORDER BY m.parent_id, m.sort_order
SELECT menu_id FROM sys_role_menu WHERE role_id = #{roleId}
